PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nancy Ross appeared via zoom for and with Raul Sermeno (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 28, 2021 is admitted to probate. Raul Paredes-Sermeno is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for January 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
